author: team
reason: Baseline run — intentionally broken prompt and vague tool descriptions
hypothesis: Measure baseline failures before any optimization

author: team
reason: System prompt rewrite: removed guess-and-go instructions; added explicit clarify rules (missing handle/URL/before-send), scope refusal for math/coding, and routing rules per tool
hypothesis: If we replace 'just guess' with clear clarify rules and scope limits the agent will stop guessing handles/URLs and stop using send for out-of-scope answers

author: team
reason: tools.yaml: rewrote policy tool description with explicit policy_area mapping (source_citation=tweet/fact; ai_research=workflow; data_privacy=keys/secrets; external_publishing=posting)
hypothesis: Vague policy_area descriptions caused agent to pick wrong area on extension eval (E01 and E08). Explicit mapping per area should fix routing.

author: team
reason: Added hacker_news tool (free HN API); added compound-request rule to prompt (call ALL tools in one turn for combined research+policy requests); added HN routing rule to prompt
hypothesis: E06 failed because agent saw 'but check policy first' and only called one tool. Explicit compound-request rule should force parallel tool call. New hacker_news tool adds HN coverage.
